mapper.select: SELECT * FROM menus WHERE is_active = true AND (required_role IS NULL OR required_role = #{role}) ORDER BY parent_id NULLS FIRST, order_num

WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( -- 최상위 메뉴 (parent_id IS NULL) SELECT * FROM menus WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND is_active = true
UNION ALL
-- 자식 메뉴 재귀 조회 SELECT m.* FROM menus m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.parent_id = mt.id WHERE m.is_active = true ), -- 현재 권한이 접근 가능한 모든 하위 권한 (재귀 CTE) accessible_roles AS ( SELECT CAST(#{role} AS VARCHAR(50)) as role UNION ALL SELECT rh.child_role FROM role_hierarchy rh INNER JOIN accessible_roles ar ON rh.parent_role = ar.role ) SELECT * FROM menu_tree WHERE required_role IS NULL OR required_role IN (SELECT role FROM accessible_roles) ORDER BY parent_id NULLS FIRST, order_num
SELECT * FROM menus WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_active = true AND (required_role IS NULL OR required_role = #{role}) ORDER BY order_num
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus (name, path, parent_id, menu_type, order_num, required_role, icon, is_active) VALUES (#{name}, #{path}, #{parentId}, #{menuType}, #{orderNum}, #{requiredRole}, #{icon}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET name = #{name}, path = #{path}, parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_type = #{menuType}, order_num = #{orderNum}, required_role = #{requiredRole}, icon = #{icon}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
